mapper.sql: id, royalty_user_id AS royaltyUserId, plus_user_id AS plusUserId, create_time AS createTime, amount
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount),0) FROM app_user_plus_royalty WHERE royalty_user_id = #{id} AND to_days(create_time) = to_days(now())
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount),0) FROM app_user_plus_royalty WHERE royalty_user_id = #{id} AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y%m')
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount),0) FROM app_user_plus_royalty WHERE royalty_user_id = #{id}
